fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. ticket next, root-scoped next, unblocked-by, and board recommendations incorporate became_actionable_at after stronger convergence pressure. 2. The new ranking signal never outranks stronger dependency-convergence pressure or blocker-state urgency. 3. Agent-facing machine-readable surfaces expose the timing and tree-ordering metadata used by the comparator. 4. Focused validation proves recently actionable work rises ahead of equivalent older work while urgent blocker repair still wins.

fields.implementation_summary: WorkflowModel now loads indexed workflow facts and uses became_actionable_at after the stronger convergence-pressure signals in candidate ordering. The CLI next, root-scoped next, unblocked-by, board recommended_next payloads, and the ticket-mcp next_tickets payload now expose became_actionable_at and last_blocker_progress_at so agent-facing workflow surfaces can explain the ordering.
fields.title: [ticket-cli][ticket-mcp] Integrate recent-unblock ordering into workflow surfaces
fields.validation_summary: Validation on 2026-05-23: cargo test -p ticket-api workflow:: -- --nocapture passed for the shared comparator changes. cargo test -p ticket-cli next_and_board_prefer_recently_actionable_candidates_and_surface_timing_metadata --test integration_board_cli -- --nocapture, cargo test -p ticket-cli unblocked_by_returns_only_actionable_reverse_dependents --test integration_board_cli -- --nocapture, and cargo test -p ticket-mcp next_tickets_prefer_recently_actionable_candidates_and_surface_timing_metadata --test integration_board_mcp -- --nocapture all passed for the CLI, board, unblocked-by, and MCP surfaces.
